nasb.text: “You know that after two days the Passover is coming, and the Son of Man is to be handed over for crucifixion.”

esv.text: “You know that after two days the Passover is coming, and the Son of Man will be delivered up to be crucified.”

cnv.text: “你們知道兩天之後就是逾越節，人子將要被交給人，釘在十字架上。”

ccb.text: “你们知道，两天后就是逾越节，到时人子会被出卖，被钉在十字架上。”

csbs.text: “你们知道，过两天就是逾越节，人子要被交出去钉上十字架。”
